name: Jolyn Led 10.5" Wall Sconce - SCN4075 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Jolyn LED light. This 10.5 inch black aluminum wall sconce brings elegance and functionality to any room. Its sleek, modern design fits seamlessly into various decor styles, making it a versatile addition to your home or office. Crafted from sturdy metal, this wall sconce is designed to complement your space with a minimalist yet striking presence.

The Jolyn casts a warm, inviting glow that enhances your surroundings, creating an atmosphere of comfort and style. Its classic black finish adds a touch of sophistication, making it suitable for any wall. Whether in your living room, bedroom, or hallway, the Jolyn provides a lighting solution that marries design with purpose.

Transform your environment effortlessly with an illumination choice that speaks to contemporary tastes. Experience the balance of form and function with the Jolyn LED wall sconce and enjoy the seamless blend of art and light in your everyday spaces.
